name: Miami
description:
Miami is a vibrant coastal city in 
South Florida known for its tropical climate, 
beautiful beaches, and diverse culture. Visitors come 
for the turquoise waters of Miami Beach, the colorful 
Art Deco architecture of South Beach, and the energetic 
nightlife and dining scene. Influenced by Latin American and 
Caribbean cultures, Miami offers a unique blend of languages, 
flavors, music, and art, making it one of the most dynamic and 
international destinations in the United States.

name: New York
description:
New York City is one of the world’s most iconic destinations, 
known for its towering skyline, rich culture, and nonstop energy. 
From the bright lights of Times Square to the peaceful paths of 
Central Park, the city offers endless attractions, world-class dining, 
historic landmarks, and vibrant neighborhoods. As a global center for art, 
finance, fashion, and entertainment, New York delivers an unforgettable 
experience filled with diversity, creativity, and excitement

name: Tokyo
description: Tokyo is a city that feels like stepping into tomorrow while staying deeply rooted in centuries-old tradition. As the capital of Japan, it blends ultra-modern innovation with serene cultural heritage, creating one of the most dynamic travel experiences in the world.
